## New Skill

**Skill name:** `skills/SKILL-NAME`

## Summary

<!-- What does this skill do and when should it be used? -->

## Category

<!-- Foundation / Strategy / Frontend / API / Performance / Mobile / BDD / Unit / Accessibility & Visual / Security & Resilience / CI & Infrastructure / Specialized -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `name` matches directory name exactly
- [ ] `name` follows naming rules (lowercase, hyphens, no `--`)
- [ ] `description` is 1-1024 chars with trigger phrases
- [ ] `SKILL.md` is under 500 lines
- [ ] **Initial Assessment** section references `.agents/qa-context.md`
- [ ] **Task-Specific Questions** section present (5-7 numbered questions)
- [ ] **Related Skills** section present with cross-references
- [ ] `evals/evals.json` provided (5-6 evals covering mainline, sub-task, casual phrasing, multi-step, off-scope handoff)
- [ ] `references/*.md` provided where deep-dive content is helpful (plain markdown, no frontmatter)

## QA accuracy checklist

- [ ] No invented CLI flags, config keys, or YAML/JSON schema fields
- [ ] No invented API method signatures or parameter names
- [ ] No invented version numbers — features that are version-dependent say so
- [ ] No production credentials, real API keys, real hostnames, or real user data in any example
- [ ] Tool trademarks (Selenium, Cypress, Playwright, k6, JMeter, etc.) are referenced but not redistributed
- [ ] Tested locally with at least one AI agent

## Linked issue (optional)

Closes #
